data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

error_handling.invalid_input: Return error with message 'Invalid registration data'
error_handling.duplicate_patient: Return error with message 'Patient already exists'
error_handling.store_failure: Return error with message 'Registration failed due to system error'

data_operations.description: Check slot availability and store appointment

error_handling.invalid_input: Return error with message 'Invalid appointment data'
error_handling.patient_not_found: Return error with message 'Patient not registered'
error_handling.slot_unavailable: Return error with message 'Appointment slot not available'
error_handling.store_failure: Return error with message 'Booking failed due to system error'

error_handling.invalid_input: Return error with message 'Invalid record request'
error_handling.patient_not_found: Return error with message 'Patient not registered'
error_handling.store_failure: Return error with message 'Records retrieval failed due to system error'

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and update profile fields

error_handling.invalid_input: Return error with message 'Invalid profile update data'
error_handling.patient_not_found: Return error with message 'Patient not registered'
error_handling.store_failure: Return error with message 'Profile update failed due to system error'
